name: Microsoft 365
description: This app enables MS Graph API-based email ingestion and investigative actions on Microsoft 365, replacing the Microsoft Graph for Office 365 app.

auth_type.description: Authentication type to use for connectivity

admin_consent.description: Admin Consent Already Provided (Required checked for CBA)

scope.description: Access Scope (for use with OAuth non-admin access; space-separated)

retry_count.description: Maximum attempts to retry the API call (Default: 3)

email_address.description: Email Address of the User (On Poll)

folder.description: Mailbox folder name/folder path or the internal office365 folder ID to ingest (On Poll)

get_folder_id.description: Retrieve the folder ID for the provided folder name/folder path automatically

first_run_max_emails.description: Maximum emails for scheduled polling first time

ingest_eml.description: Ingest EML file for the itemAttachment

actions.verbose: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

start_time.name: start_time
start_time.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

end_time.name: end_time
end_time.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

container_count.name: container_count
container_count.description: Maximum number of container records to query for.

artifact_count.name: artifact_count
artifact_count.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for.

container_id.name: container_id
container_id.description: Comma-separated list of container IDs to limit the ingestion to.

actions.description: Poll for new emails and create ES findings for each email.
actions.verbose: Callback action for the on_es_poll ingest functionality

start_time.name: start_time
start_time.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

end_time.name: end_time
end_time.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

container_count.name: container_count
container_count.description: Maximum number of findings to query for.

folder.name: folder
folder.description: Name of the folder to create

parent_folder.name: parent_folder
parent_folder.description: Parent folder name/path or ID (leave empty for root)

get_folder_id.name: get_folder_id
get_folder_id.description: Retrieve parent folder ID from folder name/path

actions.description: Get the ID of a mail folder
Get messages from a mailbox folder

get_folder_id.name: get_folder_id
get_folder_id.description: Retrieve folder ID from folder name/path

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return

folder_id.name: folder_id
folder_id.description: Parent mail folder id or well-known name

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of members to return

actions.description: List all the groups in an organization, including but not limited to Office 365 groups

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of groups to return

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of users to return

actions.verbose: 'make request' action for the app. Used to handle arbitrary HTTP requests with the app's asset

http_method.name: http_method
http_method.description: The HTTP method to use for the request.

endpoint.name: endpoint
endpoint.description: MS Graph endpoint to call, appended to the API base URL. Example: '/v1.0/me/messages' or '/beta/users/{id}/mailFolders'

headers.name: headers
headers.description: The headers to send with the request (JSON object). An example is {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}

query_parameters.name: query_parameters
query_parameters.description: Parameters to append to the URL (JSON object or query string). An example is ?key=value&key2=value2

body.name: body
body.description: The body to send with the request (JSON object). An example is {'key': 'value', 'key2': 'value2'}

timeout.name: timeout
timeout.description: The timeout for the request in seconds.

verify_ssl.name: verify_ssl
verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate.

actions.description: Move an email to a folder

get_folder_id.description: Retrieve folder ID from folder name/path

actions.description: Get user's out of office status
Add the sender email into the report

message_id.name: message_id
message_id.description: Message ID to pick the sender of

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.description: User ID to base the action of

is_message_move_requested.name: is_message_move_requested
is_message_move_requested.description: Indicates whether the message should be moved out of current folder

report_action.name: report_action
report_action.description: Indicates the type of action to be reported on the message

actions.description: Remove a sender from the blocked senders list

sender.name: sender
sender.description: Email address of sender to unblock

category.name: category
category.description: Category to add to the email

List events from user or group calendar

filter.name: filter
filter.description: OData query to filter/search for specific results

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of events to return

Resolve a name to email addresses
